entry.title: Re: Mass updtate Work Agreements
entry.content: It really depends on how you have created the employees first. If it is through "Manage workforce" application, then you may need to check the feasibility of "Import" icon , see whether this can be updated. You can also check the API (if it is created through SOAP API) in our API repository.

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: I can use <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::ns1"/>

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
You would alter your variable to the following - 

<xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::ns1"/>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How should the cost center key be defined in Employee Central?
entry.content: The reason why the Cost Center ID has the Controlling area would be handle the scenarios when you have Core Hybrid Architecture. It's where you have EC and ECC system integrated.

entry.title: Re: User id in IT0105 ST0001 was changed. What happens to...
entry.content: User changes are not allowed during workflow execution as it creates inconsistency. Any change in the business document can restart the workflow and it could be a reason there was a new user or you may also need to check the substitute rules

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API'
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data

entry.title: Re: Adding / changing printer for Manage Physical Inventory Documents app
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?

entry.title: Re: SAP IRPA Cloud Factory Trial: Execution is not permitted on tenant
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: SAP IRPA Cloud Factory Trial: Execution is not permitted on tenant
entry.content: Hello, i have pay-as-you-go subscription plan for sap build process automation, with attended-automation plan subscribed, assignd quota. but i get the same error, when i try to run automation launcher , SAP_IPA_05066: Execution is not permitted on tenant "xxxxxxx" . Any help is appreciated @Srinivas @priyanka_kes9

entry.title: How do you synchronize suppliers in SAP Ariba with Business Partners post refresh?
entry.content:
Ariba Experts,

When a client conducts a refresh of their QAS environment with their PRD environment and copies all their PRD Business Partners, how do you synchronize them with the SAP Ariba Test environment, which will already have suppliers from previous integrations with the QAS, implementation, and previous refreshes? Since there are already suppliers in the SAP Ariba Test environment, many of them will have the same ERP Vendor ID as the copied Business Partners from PRD. Additionally, when a new supplier is created in the SAP Ariba Test environment and integrated with with QAS, there is a possibillity that the new ERP Vendor ID assigned will already exist in the SAP Ariba Test environment and therefore not completely integrate.

For example, a client just completed their second QAS refresh in two years and their PRD environment has ~4400 Business Partners that were copied to the QAS environment while the SAP Ariba Test environment has ~14,000 suppliers.

I understand that SAP Ariba does not delete suppliers, but deactivates them.

I am trying to understand the best approach for synchronizing the refreshed QAS Business Partners with the SAP Ariba Test environment. There must be a method of appropriately deactivating the previous SAP Ariba Test suppliers to support a supplier master data import of Business Partners to maintain ERP Vendor ID and other IDs so that the SAP Ariba Test supplier database is synchronized with the QAS Business Partner data base.

Any information on how best to do this would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Default account assignment for cost element in FS00
entry.content:
Hi friends,

There was an issue with the depreciation GL 7xxxxx while running the depreciation. it says cost element 7xxxxx should have the CO object.

when i go to FS00 and open this GL 7xxxxx and click on edit cost element

in the Default acc assignment tab I have assigned the cost center.

 

But we have the same GL 7xxxx in other company codes as well and the cost center is updating the GL in all the company codes.

i want only one company code GL should update the cost center. 

please suggest me the right process to do the same.

 

Thanks. #fs00 #costcenter 

@OwenLiu @HenrikeGrötecke @Fabio_Sohn @RAHEEL_BABAR @Edrilan_Berisha

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content: Hello, what happens is that with the change of range for inspection class 01, you included the other inspection classes.

entry.title: Re: Data Analyzer URL Parameter
entry.content: Hello colleagues, I have managed to add 2 values "EMEA" and "EMEA North" for one dimension like this (with help of html encoding for double quotations and square brackets), if it helps anyone. So it's: NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer("&/dz/?dataSourceName=".concat(Table_1.getDataSource().getInfo().modelId).concat("&systemType=MODEL&f01Dim=Geo_Level_1_Region_Description&f01Val=%5B%22EMEA%22,%22EMEA%20North%22%5D&f0p=in"));

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hello  - Results as follows :

  1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.

    1.  

  2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

    1.  

    2.  

    3.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: nice day

entry.title: Re: I want to export or save an invoice as an xml file.
entry.content:
Hi Stefan 

You don't need a license for EDOC_COCKPIT you can use the trial version for free.

With the free version, you can create an invoice and display XML but can not send it.

If you cannot view the invoice in the cockpit, there is a high probability that there is a deficiency somewhere in the configuration steps that you have overlooked.

BR

entry.title: Re: Subobject type Z100 is not valid for object type BT126_APPT
entry.content:
Thank you, this was really helpful for me also. To be precise what i did:

looking for: 

component usage: CUBT131QI_SLSQ

Object type: BT115Q_SLSQ

Subobject (hardcoded): ZCN1_ZCN1

My entry in customizing of object types mentioned: 

Object type: BT115Q_SLSQ

Callback class (made custom): ZCL_NEK_OBJTYPE_CALLBACK

Component name (interaction layer): BT

BOL Object: BTOrder

BOR object type: BUS2000115

Enahced object: SALES_QUOTATION

Hope this will fasten definition for others.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Good afternoon, 

My name is Kobe, I am a recent MHA graduate from UNC Chapel Hill. Before attending grad school, I served in the US Air Force for 6 years where I specialized in supply chain management. I am currently looking forward to learning more about SAP Supply Chain so that I can list my certifications on my resume and bolster my chances of bettering my career.

entry.title: Re: Statutory reporting transformation with SAP S/4HANA: charting a successful adoption journey
entry.content: Good Information.

entry.title: Stock upload with existing handling Units
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to upload stock where I have HU with external number range.

For some reason , when I upload a stock I get a warning message "HU XXX is not set for external. New number is taken from internal range".

Any idea, which settings I have to change?

entry.title: Bloquear campo en documentos de marketing ordenes de venta
entry.content:
Buenas Tardes

Soy nuevo en SAP y necesitaría de su apoyo, ya que tengo la necesidad de que en las líneas de marketing del proceso de ordenes de venta se necesita bloquear un campo UDF personalizado. Se necesita que sea por transaction. Este campo es tipo fecha.

entry.title: Re: SAC publication on DWC
entry.content: Hello, have you found an alternative to be able to schedule the calendar using DWC Live Connection?

entry.title: Re: Using Github Actions to Deploy a CAP App (MTA)
entry.content:
@Christopher_Ketzler 

Great blog! While I have used the predefined action before, I hadn't thought of creating my own script instead. Thank you for sharing this.

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
hi @Sandeep_9966 

Sorry for getting back to you only now on your question. Have you tried the below ? 

  • Percentages in the Proration field can be higher than 100% only if the following tag in the XML of the template (currently not supported through Admin UI) is set to True : canExceedReviewPeriod=”true”

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: C4C Service Process- Multiple Registered Product
entry.content: Hi Ankush, Thank you for your response. I also tried a similar approach: I went to Ticket -> Overview facet -> Product section, clicked the value help for the Serial Id field, and in the 'Select Registered Product' window, I used the Advanced Filter. I removed all default values (such as Customer ID) and created a custom query as needed. However, the next time I tried to add a Registered Product using the Advanced Filter, the Account ID appeared by default, and it seems that this Account ID cannot be modified. It appears that removing the Account ID from the Advanced Filter will always require manual intervention

entry.title: Re: SM01 Lock /Unlock Tcode - Is this a Basis or Security Tcode?
entry.content: Patel, como estas, existe alguna TRX que reemplace a la SM01?

entry.title: Risk category for 10% of open items or open item more than 30 days ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have configured Risk category for  Max open item % = 10 and NoDays openI as 30. But it blocks only for number of days open not for Max open item%

What am I missing?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Are SAP ASE and IQ On Premise maintained?
entry.content: SAP IQ is available as part of the Adaptive Server Platform which also includes SAP ASE and SAP Replication Server. We are working through the planning process for the next major release of SAP IQ.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone! Excited to be a part of the SAP Community. I work for SAP Emarsys and I'm normally based in San Francisco, California, although for the better part of this year, I've been working and traveling remotely across the United States, exploring my next potential move. Currently I'm located in Denver, CO. 

I'll be occasionally posting on topics surrounding SAP Emarsys releases, product innovations and marketing related topics. Cheers!

entry.title: Re: BS013 Message in CO88
entry.content: is this issue is resolved? if so how?

entry.title: Re: Enlarging the use of BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST
entry.content:
Olá! 

Boa tarde,

Nesta mesma BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST eu consigo listar as partidas da conta do razão? Tenho um desenvolvimento e não quero fazer call transaction na FAGLFLEXA.

Caso seja em outra BAPI, se puder compartilhar agradeço.

Obrigada.

entry.title: Convert fields to upper case - Report Storie
entry.content: Good afternoon Community, do any of you know how to configure a column in people storie to change from lower case to upper case? I have a report with several fields in lower case, so I need to change these fields to upper case. Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Bloquear campo en documentos de marketing
entry.content: Hola amigo como hago si deseo bloquear un campo en la linea que depende de la condicion de otro campo. Es decir si el valor del otro campo es = 1 no debería de permitir modificar el campo. Son 2 campos nuevos que cree en líneas de marketing.

entry.title: Re: Fiori My Inbox - Intent Based Navigation - SWFVVTP Missing Parameters

SAP note has been released:
3505230 – U.S. Tax Reporter Year End 2024 Announcement

Graziela

entry.title: BAPI para documentos da FAGLFLEXA
entry.content:
Boa noite,

Tenho um desenvolvimento que precisa ler as partidas da FAGLFLEXA. Qual BAPI posso utilizar?

Obrigada.

entry.title: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a requirement I have been working with for the last couple of weeks but I'm stuck and don't know how to achieve what I need.

I need to be able to expose a service to call as POST with a deep body (header, items, partners, etc) and in the service I need to call I_SalesOrderTP using MODIFY ENTITIES to create a sales order with the payload recieved.

Can't use I_SalesOrderTP API directly since I need the option to do some pre and post processing with a lot of custom code related to the business.

I've tried creating behavior implementations from CDS and custom entities, tried unamanged and managed with unmanaged save, tried using static actions with deep parameters and deep result but was not able to make it work.

Is there a way I can create a service NOT from a CDS/BEHAVIOR? Do I need to go with HTTP service?

Any help will be highly appreciated!

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: 2001070576 is not in interval that is provided for this pack.material type
entry.content:
In EWM, we have a process to create inbound delivery for serialized materials and then create the HU for those, however that step fails with error:

2001070576 is not in interval  that is provided for this pack.material type

Looked at SPRO but see nothing out of sorts. Not sure where to navigate to in config to rectify this situation.

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – SAP Watch List Screening for Simplified Due Diligence and Compliance
entry.content:
Hello @JohnS, 

Thank you for your comment.

We are aware of the limitation to one content provider, and the associated challenges.
We are working on a solution for this. Unfortunately, we are not yet able to communicate any information on availability.

I will update this blog and comment once more information becomes available.

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: Następne spotkanie grupy katowickiej
entry.content:
Cześć,

ponieważ SAP Stammtisch datowany na 27 sierpnia nie odbędzie się, otwieram dyskusję, co do decyzji o następnym terminie spotkania Grupy. Piszcie śmiało Wasze propozycje terminów oraz propozycje miejsca spotkania w Katowicach. Pozdrawiam!

entry.title: Re: Następne spotkanie grupy katowickiej
entry.content: Sugestie dotyczące następnego terminu SAP Stammtisch oraz propozycje miejsca spotkania możecie też przesyłać na forum Grupy na LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/13782544/

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Here's my submission:

1. list preview:

2. search for description with specific status:

entry.title: Re: Infonavit discount /380
entry.content:
Hola Carlos,

la idea que nos das de realizar este workaround es interesante. Muchas gracias.

Hasta ahora no logre a convencer a SAP de que este es un tema de ellos, ya que no tuvimos problemas antes de aplicar los ultimos parches (Abril-Junio 2024) de notas. Tambien tenemos ciertas reglas internas que afectan dias de infonavit, pero insisto que antes de la instalacion de parches todo nos funcionaba bien a pesar de nuestras reglas.

Tambien como muchas empresas no estan al dia con estos parches me imagino que todavia no se reporto el tema tan frecuente.

Gracias,

Miroslav

entry.title: Email Notifications Workbook
entry.content:
Hi,

Could you please advise me on where I can find the Email Notifications workbook for PM&GM and CDP?

I downloaded the Best Practices workbook, but it did not include the Email Notifications tab.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Third party Service Delivery
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible that you define your material with item category group CBNA (3rd party w/o SN) instead of SERV?.

Since it will never be in stock and you will not have shipping notification it does not necessarily need to exist as a SERV and as a CBNA you will have the full range of item categories for 3rd party items available for this material, as below.

Please indicate if this is helpful. Thanks,

-Carlos

entry.title: Re: How to get the Cumulative Quantity for a specific Delivery like in the VA33? (Urgent)
entry.content: This question is not relevant for S/4HANA Public Cloud. Please remove the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales tag

entry.title: Re: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing from EWM to ERP post Goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello All,

We found the solution.

Basis settings was missed in table /SCWM/TWMEQUEUE.

After maintaining the entry, PPF is getting executed successfully.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing fro...
entry.content:
Hello All,

We found the solution.

Basis settings was missed in table /SCWM/TWMEQUEUE.

After maintaining the entry, PPF is getting executed successfully.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content:
I think you can extend standard bo with static action to achieve it.

let's us know if you have detailed error.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

Descriptive Search

Entries Filtered by Overall Status

Entries filtered byTravel ID, but without dialogue screen

Entries filtered by Travel ID with dialogue screen

Result set of dialogue interaction

Thank you for your time.

entry.title: Re: Unable to (re)create RFC destinations in solman_setup
entry.content: good job symon

entry.title: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm trying to run a function module from Eclipse but I'm getting the following initializer errors:

Execute failed: JCo initialization failed with java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError ...KNIME\configuration\org.eclipse.osgi\705\0\.cp\sapjco3.dll: Can't find dependent libraries

Execute failed: Could not initialize class com.sap.conn.jco.rt.JCoRuntimeFactory

I'm using Windows 11, running on Java 17 and I've already installed the Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64). I've also tried putting the JAR and the dll in the same directory but it didn't work. 

Any help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content: Hi Junwu, thanks for the help! I don’t have an specific error, but the main issues I’m facing are: 1) When using a static action, I can call the I_SalesOrderTP BO and get everything in MAPPED table except for the sales order number. To get it I need to use the sentence CONVERT KEY but is not allowed to do it inside an action and I get a dump. 2) If I try to go with unmanaged save with a determine method on save, I can call the BO inside the method and then call the CONVERT KEY sentence in SAVE_MODIFIED method. At that point I get the sales order number but I have no way to return it to the service since in SAVE_MODIFIED I don’t have the MAPPED parameter. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content: I've also tried using late numbering and adding the logic inmethod "ADJUST_NUMBERS" (since it has the MAPPED parameter) but inside I can't use the CONVERT_KEY sentence.

entry.title: Task Checklist Observer Comments Section Required
entry.content:
Hi,

Is anyone using task checklists and has found a way to make the comments per task and overall notes section required?

 

Thanks,

Alyssa

entry.title: How do I access the Manage Bank Messages?
entry.content: I have a SAP MBC product in my organisation. What link do I need to access to view the Manage Bank Messages so that I can visualise the files that are being sent and received via SAP MBC?

entry.title: Installation guide for ORacle RAC 19c on AIX 7.2
entry.content:
What is the installation steps for Oracle RAC 19c on Cluster or HA.

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Installation guide for ORacle RAC 19c on AIX 7.2
entry.content:
Please check Grid Infrastructure Installation and Upgrade Guide for IBM AIX on POWER Systems (64-Bit)

https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/oracle-database/19/cwaix/oracle-grid-infrastructure-installation-checklist.html#GUID-71A93E07-7E50-449C-B425-02F04A2EA8E6

and also Technology Blogs from SAP community
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/installation-of-sap-on-rac-with-oracle-asm/ba-p/13069036
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/installation-of-sap-on-rac-with-oracle-asm-part-1-distributed-environment/ba-p/13181339
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/installation-of-sap-on-rac-with-oracle-asm-part-2-distributed-environment/ba-p/13187529

entry.title: Different DBSID while migrating the DB using DMO (Heterogenous Migration)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

We are planning to migrate from  Oracle DB to PERSON_NAME DB for CR system. In that process we were planning to perform combined upgrade and database migration from Oracle to PERSON_NAME using DMO tool.

Can we use different DBSID for the target PERSON_NAME system ?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Different DBSID while migrating the DB using DMO (Het...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Regarding to your concern, I would suggest that you refer to the admin guide 'Change the SID of an SAP HANA System'.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Web Client not able to open attachment and attach document
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Customer is using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.191) FP 2202 (64-bit)

On webclient page, when try to open pdf attachment, it give error as below;

 

When i try to upload document via webportal, it keep loading endless.

This is the attachment folder and i have mount this folder as below;

 

 

What else do i miss?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Tan Su Hsiang

entry.title: Re: Comparing previous and current values for custom MDF in Successfactors
entry.content:
Hi @NeeleshKamath 

I created an effective dated MDF object and would like to retrieve as of a specific date the value of the current PCG (called "Annualized Salary") as well as the value of the previous PCG.

Is it possible to save the value of the previous PCG record into an MDF ? I haven't found a way.

The business case is to allow customers who don't have a field Date of Last Salary Increase in Comp Info with on save business rule to find out who got a salary increase between the beginning of the fiscal year (Jan 1st) and the beginning of the comp cycle.

Thank you

Xavier

entry.title: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an existing smartforms and would like to check a text element value. It shows blanks in the text editor. As long as I change the editor setting in RSCPSETEDITOR or i18n, it also the same. How can I see the variable of the text element? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Why I can not use date/time dimension as linked dimension in optimized mode?
entry.content: when I convert classic mode story to the optimized mode story, it shows the error. Why I can not use date/time dimension as linked dimension in optimized mode? #sap analytics cloud#

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: Need to upgrade SAP GUI patch about script.

Thanks

Eric

Jenn

entry.title: Re: Making employees recently increased in EC ineligible in compensation worksheets
entry.content:
@Svetlana92 @ErikaT 

You are correct, something is not working anymore as it used to. 

I found a workaround that I will document tomorrow and share here.

I also asked a colleague if there is a way with standard business rule to access the value of the previous PCG as of a specific date.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: Which patch level should I upgrade?

entry.title: How to assign Authorization Group to an user?
entry.content:
Can't assign an Authorization Group to an User, how can this be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to assign Authorization Group to an user?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

I have provided a KBA below that will assist in the process of assigning an authorization group to an user:

3324425 - How to Restrict 'Journal Entry Document Type' Authorization

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

entry.title: find who can process credit notes
entry.content:
I am looking for to find a t-code, 

who can process credit notes.  this person can approve a credit note up to $1000, this person can approve up to $10,000, etc.

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content:
Sorry, I don't know how to say it. My SAP GUI version is 770, and the patch file I used is SCRLTESP77000_0-70006481

This link is discussing this patch.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-gui-latest-patch/ba-p/13049064/page/2

I hope to be of help to you. This is my first time replying on the forum and I am an entry-level developer.

entry.title: Control of user's data entry
entry.content:
User is requested to restrict the data entry for different users by hiding the tabs in product/ supplier master. Can the IMG configuration of “Maintain Field Selection for Data screens” and “Assign Fields to Field Selection Groups” in S4hana cloud public edition achieve this purpose?

 

Or any workaround that similar as ECC can hide tabs in product/ customer/ supplier master to control users’ data entry?

entry.title: Classification class value list restriction?
entry.content:
Can we restrict the classification class list values in product master by business user role? Client requested different team can only have access to part of the classification class.

 

Moreover, would it also be possible to limit the classification class assignment value help list per user role?

entry.title: Setting of price condition type for fast entry
entry.content: Although there is configuration available in IMG of “condition type for fast entry” for the PPR0 price, the system still not allow the fast entry of sales price field in “Manage sales order – version 2” app

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: In the GUI logon pad, I see the GUI version is 760 final release and patch level 4. Should I upgrade the GUI version to 770? how to apply the patch file as well?

entry.title: Re: 500 missing Zone Information and internal server error while launching the deployed HTML5 buil
entry.content: Please see the solution from here: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981

entry.title: Error when deleting an EWM resource
entry.content:
Hello All,

Someone resigned, so their SAP ID was deleted.
After that, when trying to delete the EWM resource, this error appears:
Index entry (object type L) does not exist
Message No. /LIME/CORE045

I've searched but couldn't find any relevant information.
Has anyone experienced this or knows a solution?
Thanks in advance for your response.

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: You don't need to upgrade the SAP GUI version. Download SCR LEGACY TEXT EDITOR GUI7.60 and install it.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition User Exit
entry.content: Thank you for the response. I will refer to your answer and look into it.

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cl...
entry.content:
Hi,

In the screenshot, you have enabled usage for CDS Views I_SLSPRCGCNDNRECDTEMPLATE and I_SLSPRCGCNDNRECDVALIDITYTP_2, so I think you can use these CDS Views to search in Customer Data Browser and check custom field's value.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: Where can I get it?

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/software-downloads.html?anchorId=section_1521753191

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: Sorry, where can I find the download link?

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/abap/3353526054.html Sorry, I am a P user and do not have the permissions of an S user, so I am unable to access the specific page for software download.

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cl...
entry.content:
Hi Zhehui,

I couldn't find these CDS Views in Customer Data Browser...

Could you help me what's next step I should do?

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request fai...
entry.content: Hi Sushaku, thanks for your information. But maybe it's not for my case, because what I am using is Adaptation Project not SAP Fiori Application generator

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/abap/3353526054.html this page is mention SAPscript text editior. But I am using Smartforms, is it the same?

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: 我确信应用此补丁可以解决智能表单不显示的问题，因为740及以上版本没有预装脚本，而且由于您是760，智能表单无法显示。

entry.title: Re: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content: I am certain that applying this patch can solve the issue of smartforms not displaying, as versions 740  above do not come with pre installed scripts, and since you are 760, smartforms cannot be displayed.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @ramiz_sipai 

The "Unexpected HTTP Status code 502 for API action - Submit " error during the submission process likely indicates that your JWT token has expired. To resolve this issue, please generate a new token.

Thanks and Regards

Mahesh Varma

entry.title: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content:
Can inbound delivery generate inspection lot? 

Besides, why the picking status is “not yet picked” in the outbound delivery but the output status of “delivery picking list” is still shown as “completed”? How to release the output status, so the changes update can also be reflected in the output document?

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP BW Request Housekeeping
entry.content: Thankz Frank!

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside...
entry.content:
Example XML body with reserved characters - 

<employees>

    <employee>
        <id>EMP123</id>
        <name>John *Doe%</name>
        <email>john.doe@:company.com</email>
        <department>Sales & Marketing</department>
        <role>Manager#</role>
        <address>1234 Elm Street; Apt [5B]</address>
        <phone>(555) 123-4567</phone>
        <notes>Key account handler | VIP clients</notes>
    </employee>
</employees>


Groovy script to remove all reserved characters and keep the XML structure intact.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.util.regex.Pattern

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(String)
    
    // Define reserved characters and pattern
    def reservedChars = ['*', '%', '?', ':', ';', '=', '(', ')', '[', ']', '|', '#', '@']
    def pattern = reservedChars.collect { Pattern.quote(it) }.join('|')

    // Function to clean reserved characters from XML content
    def cleanContent = { content ->
        return content.replaceAll(pattern, '')
    }

    // Replace reserved characters in XML content manually
    def cleanedBody = body.replaceAll(/(<[^>]+>)([^<]*)(<\/[^>]+>)/) { match ->
        def startTag = match[1]
        def content = match[2]
        def endTag = match[3]
        return startTag + cleanContent(content) + endTag
    }

    // Set cleaned XML body
    message.setBody(cleanedBody)
    return message
}
